reviews.review_description: Kudos to the developer for updating the screenshots with true in-game captures to show buyers what gameplay to expect.  This helps greatly since they are often the basis of our decision to purchase or not. Truly, this game is fun and has the potential to be great. 👍

developer_response.body: Thank you so much! Your feedback means a lot and truly helps us continue improving the game. We’ll keep working to make it even better!

reviews.review_description:
This game plays almost identically to Call of Courage: WWII by the same developer just with dinos instead of soldiers. However after a couple missions the game crashed and after reloading everything is in Chinese with seemingly no way to switch back to English.

I found out how to get back to English but only by replaying level 1. Played till I got to the first human enemies who I let shoot me for awhile and they did no damage lol.

 Anyway despite the dev saying this is not the same as their wwii 2 game, besides the dinos and the setting yes its almost identical gameplay even down the very odd choice of having a headshot announcer like a multi-player deathmatch game

developer_response.body: I recently updated the game, fixing the crashing issue and improving the graphics quality. Please try it again, and if you enjoy it, consider updating your rating. It would mean a lot.

reviews.review_description: Better than being at universal studios theme park. Like a real Disney world experience. Not to scary for kids but still exciting. The models of the dinosaurs are very well done and realistic. If you think it's not...let them get close and see if you go running in the other direction. For a five dollar bill...what a $100 thrill. Jesus loves you !

Wow! This Jurassic Zoo game blew me away! 🦖 The controls feel fantastic, super smooth and responsive, it’s so much fun to play. The graphics are jaw dropping, every dinosaur and environment looks so realistic that I felt like I was actually in a Jurassic park! The storyline is thrilling, just like being in a blockbuster Jurassic movie
Game has improved still a bit clunky on menus shaking around but game and controls seem improve definitely worth a punt if you love dinos well done to the dev team

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for updating your review and for the kind words! We’re really happy to hear you liked the improvements. We truly appreciate your support and feedback. The menu shaking issue you mentioned will be fixed in an upcoming update.

reviews.review_description: Jurassic Zoo VR is hands down one of the most immersive VR games I’ve played! The moment you put on the headset, you feel transported straight into a prehistoric world full of life and excitement. The dinosaurs look stunningly realistic, and the attention to detail in the environments is incredible. The controls are super intuitive and fun
This game is an incredibly realistic VR adventure with lifelike Dinosaurs and immersive environment.

Jurassic Zoo VR is an incredible experience! The dinosaur animations are lifelike, and the environments are stunningly immersive. It’s thrilling to interact with these prehistoric creatures up close. The controls are intuitive and the gameplay is smooth. A must-play for any dino or VR fan!

reviews.review_title: Jurassic Zoo Sets a New Standard in VR!
reviews.review_description:
Jurassic Zoo is an exciting and immersive VR dinosaur hunting game,Great graphics, smooth gameplay, and no motion sickness thanks to the teleport option. A must-play for dino fans.
One of the best dinosaur hunting games on Quest.  just pure fun. Incredible VR hunting! Dinosaurs feel alive and the teleport makes it super comfortable.Exciting, easy to play, and super immersive. Worth every penny!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the amazing feedback! 🦕 We're thrilled that you’re enjoying Jurassic Zoo and found the experience smooth, immersive, and comfortable. It’s awesome to hear that the teleport movement is helping with comfort and letting you focus on the fun. We really appreciate your kind words and support, more exciting updates are on the way!

reviews.review_description: This is a great game and it shows that new Jurassic world games will be almost exactly like this because this is a new level. This is a good game and the best game realistic dinosaurs realistic guns everything good this is the best VR dinosaur game I ever experienced.￼

For the price it’s at now, this is an absolute steal! This game reminds me of that Jurassic park arcade game you’d find at movie theaters and Dave n busters where you’re shooting escaped dinosaurs inside Jurassic park! Dunno if this is just user error but there’s this weird bug or something where the game thinks you’re left handed. When you always try to grab a gun with your right hand, your right hand is on the muzzle area instead of being on the foregrip. You’d reset the grip positions by gripping the muzzle area with the left hand. Otherwise, so far this game is a blast!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the awesome review and the nostalgia throwback! 🎯🦖 We're glad the game brought back those classic Jurassic park arcade vibes, that’s exactly the kind of fun we aimed for. And thank you for pointing out the hand/grip issue, it sounds like the game may be defaulting to left-handed mode, and we’re actively working to make the grip system more intuitive for everyone. Your feedback helps a ton, and we’re so glad you're having a blast so far!
